endpoints.name: GET /{tenantID}/applications
endpoints.description: Lists applications by filter parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{tenantID}/applications
endpoints.description: Create a new application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{tenantID}/applications/{applicationObjectId}
endpoints.description: Get an application by object ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONOBJECTID}} with a real applicationobjectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{tenantID}/applications/{applicationObjectId}
endpoints.description: Delete an application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONOBJECTID}} with a real applicationobjectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /{tenantID}/applications/{applicationObjectId}
endpoints.description: Update an existing application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONOBJECTID}} with a real applicationobjectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{tenantID}/applications/{applicationObjectId}/$links/owners
endpoints.description: Add an owner to an application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONOBJECTID}} with a real applicationobjectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{tenantID}/applications/{applicationObjectId}/$links/owners/{ownerObjectId}
endpoints.description: Remove a member from owners.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OWNEROBJECTID}} with a real ownerobjectid. Replace {{APPLICATIONOBJECTID}} with a real applicationobjectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{tenantID}/applications/{applicationObjectId}/keyCredentials
endpoints.description: Get the keyCredentials associated with an application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONOBJECTID}} with a real applicationobjectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /{tenantID}/applications/{applicationObjectId}/keyCredentials
endpoints.description: Update the keyCredentials associated with an application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONOBJECTID}} with a real applicationobjectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: Directory objects that are owners of the application.
endpoints.description: The owners are a set of non-admin users who are allowed to modify this object.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONOBJECTID}} with a real applicationobjectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{tenantID}/applications/{applicationObjectId}/passwordCredentials
endpoints.description: Get the passwordCredentials associated with an application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONOBJECTID}} with a real applicationobjectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /{tenantID}/applications/{applicationObjectId}/passwordCredentials
endpoints.description: Update passwordCredentials associated with an application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONOBJECTID}} with a real applicationobjectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{tenantID}/deletedApplications
endpoints.description: Gets a list of deleted applications in the directory.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{tenantID}/deletedApplications/{applicationObjectId}
endpoints.description: Hard-delete an application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONOBJECTID}} with a real applicationobjectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{tenantID}/deletedApplications/{objectId}/restore
endpoints.description: Restores the deleted application in the directory.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECTID}} with a real objectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{tenantID}/domains
endpoints.description: Gets a list of domains for the current tenant.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{tenantID}/domains/{domainName}
endpoints.description: Gets a specific domain in the current tenant.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DOMAINNAME}} with a real domainname. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{tenantID}/getObjectsByObjectIds
endpoints.description: Gets the directory objects specified in a list of object IDs. You can also specify which resource collections (users, groups, etc.) should be searched by specifying the optional types parameter.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{tenantID}/groups
endpoints.description: Gets list of groups for the current tenant.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{tenantID}/groups
endpoints.description: Create a group in the directory.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{tenantID}/groups/{groupObjectId}/$links/members
endpoints.description: Add a member to a group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{GROUPOBJECTID}} with a real groupobjectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{tenantID}/groups/{groupObjectId}/$links/members/{memberObjectId}
endpoints.description: Remove a member from a group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{GROUPOBJECTID}} with a real groupobjectid. Replace {{MEMBEROBJECTID}} with a real memberobjectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{tenantID}/groups/{objectId}
endpoints.description: Gets group information from the directory.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECTID}} with a real objectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{tenantID}/groups/{objectId}
endpoints.description: Delete a group from the directory.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECTID}} with a real objectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{tenantID}/groups/{objectId}/$links/owners
endpoints.description: Add an owner to a group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECTID}} with a real objectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{tenantID}/groups/{objectId}/$links/owners/{ownerObjectId}
endpoints.description: Remove a member from owners.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OWNEROBJECTID}} with a real ownerobjectid. Replace {{OBJECTID}} with a real objectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{tenantID}/groups/{objectId}/getMemberGroups
endpoints.description: Gets a collection of object IDs of groups of which the specified group is a member.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECTID}} with a real objectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{tenantID}/groups/{objectId}/members
endpoints.description: Gets the members of a group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECTID}} with a real objectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: Directory objects that are owners of the group.
endpoints.description: The owners are a set of non-admin users who are allowed to modify this object.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECTID}} with a real objectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{tenantID}/isMemberOf
endpoints.description: Checks whether the specified user, group, contact, or service principal is a direct or transitive member of the specified group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{tenantID}/me
endpoints.description: Gets the details for the currently logged-in user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{tenantID}/me/ownedObjects
endpoints.description: Get the list of directory objects that are owned by the user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{tenantID}/oauth2PermissionGrants
endpoints.description: Queries OAuth2 permissions grants for the relevant SP ObjectId of an app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{tenantID}/oauth2PermissionGrants
endpoints.description: Grants OAuth2 permissions for the relevant resource Ids of an app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{tenantID}/oauth2PermissionGrants/{objectId}
endpoints.description: Delete a OAuth2 permission grant for the relevant resource Ids of an app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECTID}} with a real objectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{tenantID}/servicePrincipals
endpoints.description: Gets a list of service principals from the current tenant.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{tenantID}/servicePrincipals
endpoints.description: Creates a service principal in the directory.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{tenantID}/servicePrincipals/{objectId}
endpoints.description: Gets service principal information from the directory. Query by objectId or pass a filter to query by appId
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECTID}} with a real objectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{tenantID}/servicePrincipals/{objectId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a service principal from the directory.

endpoints.description: Add an owner to a service principal.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECTID}} with a real objectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{tenantID}/servicePrincipals/{objectId}/$links/owners/{ownerObjectId}
endpoints.description: Remove a member from owners.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OWNEROBJECTID}} with a real ownerobjectid. Replace {{OBJECTID}} with a real objectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: Principals (users, groups, and service principals) that are assigned to this service principal.

endpoints.description: Update the keyCredentials associated with a service principal.

endpoints.description: Gets the passwordCredentials associated with a service principal.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECTID}} with a real objectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /{tenantID}/servicePrincipals/{objectId}/passwordCredentials
endpoints.description: Updates the passwordCredentials associated with a service principal.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECTID}} with a real objectid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{tenantID}/servicePrincipalsByAppId/{applicationID}/objectId
endpoints.description: Gets an object id for a given application id from the current tenant.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONID}} with a real applicationid. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{tenantID}/users
endpoints.description: Gets list of users for the current tenant.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{WINDOWS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your WINDOWS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TENANTID}} with a real tenantid.
